chunks.text: Faculty Support Staff - EECS at Berkeley Faculty Support Staff Faculty Support Contacts eecs-chair@eecs.berkeley.edu All communication with and about the EE and CS Chairs. faculty-award@eecs.berkeley.edu Faculty award information and updates. acad-personnel@eecs.berkeley.edu Academic personnel (merits, promotions, leave, recruitment, benefits, faculty polices, etc.) eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu Faculty information updates (change in room number, assistants, etc.). Course support contacts (textbooks, copying, etc.) Setting up a computer in an office in Cory, Soda, or Sutardja Dai Halls Faculty IT needs can be arranged through the Computer User Support Group (CUSG) by purchasing a workstation contract . If you have any questions, you can send them to the EECS Help Desk: help@eecs.berkeley.edu EECS Chairs Office EECS Chairs Office Manager Thomas Silva 231 Cory, +1 (510) 642-7699 thomassilva@eecs.berkeley.edu Assistant to the EECS Chairs Alex Sandoval 385 Soda, +1 (510) 642-0253 alexandersandoval@eecs.berkeley.edu Academic Personnel Faculty, visiting faculty, lecturer appointments & promotions; visas, pay rates and dates; benefits; sabbatical leave eligibility; University academic personnel rules and procedures. Julia Flinker Director, Academic Personnel 381 Soda Hall, +1 (510) 643-6618 jflinker@berkeley.eu Academic Personnel Managers EE – Chris Ruggiero 223 Cory Hall, +1 (510) 643-8208 chrisjru@eecs.berkeley.edu CS – Monica Aiello 395 Soda Hall, +1 (510) 643-5383 monica.aiello@eecs.berkeley.edu EE/CS – Pamela Ong 369 Soda Hall, +1 (510) 643-7848 mailto:pong@eecs.berkeley.edu Academic Personnel Analysts EE – Heather Levien 223 Cory Hall heather@eecs.berkeley.edu CS – Jessica Rojas 395 Soda Hall, +1 510 644-4674 jessicarojas@eecs.berkeley.edu CS – open Faculty Awards Heather Levien 223 Cory Hall heather@eecs.berkeley.edu People Alumni EE Distinguished Alumni Award Winners CS Distinguished Alumni Award Winners
